human_actions_pending.action: Run scripts/seed-bob-smith.ts against the DEV Postgres DB
human_actions_pending.context: Cannot run from this sandbox — dev host Jaces-Mac-mini.local (192.168.68.10) is on a LAN unreachable here. Run: set -a && source .env.local && set +a && npx tsx scripts/seed-bob-smith.ts (ENCRYPTION_KEY must be set or sections 3/4/5 store plaintext and the report won't decrypt).

decisions.decision: client_id is authoritative; auto-create role=client user (no email) when assigning to a name with no account
decisions.rationale: every assessment must map to a client account so the client portal (filtered by client_id) shows it

decisions.decision: client-login defaults to mode 'welcome' (branded email, no sign-on link), not magic-link
decisions.rationale: creating an account after-hours must not auto-send a sign-on link

decisions.decision: clients view ALL sections read-only and default to the Section 11 report; section layout has an SSR ownership gate (replaced the old client->/report redirect)
decisions.rationale: clients should see the same Section 11 report coaches see, interactive pillars + marker modal, with zero writes and no IDOR

uncommitted_files: test-results/.last-run.json (untracked test-runner artifact, not part of any task)
next_action: Nothing in flight — main is fully deployed (9423dea, prod health 200). Await the next user request, or pick up an optional item above.
context_notes: All work this session shipped via /gsd:quick --validate (planner->checker->executor->verifier) on feature branches merged fast-forward to main, each triggering DO App Platform auto-deploy (monitored to ACTIVE). No active phase/plan. KEY ENV CONSTRAINT: this sandbox cannot reach the dev Postgres (Jaces-Mac-mini.local / 192.168.68.10:5432) over mDNS or by IP, and .local does not resolve here — so all dev-DB scripts (seed, backfill) are written for the USER to run. GOTCHA saved to memory: switching the active session/role (impersonation) needs a window.location reload, not router.refresh(), or useSession()-cached UI (Sidebar) stays stale.
